briefdescription.para: Records the state of the DA_ephys panel into the numerical GUI state wave.
Records the state of the DA_ephys panel into the textual GUI state wave.
Query a control value from the numerical gui state wave.

detaileddescription.para: This does return the zero-based index for PopupMenues.
Convienience wrapper to make the call sites nicer.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default to NaN] Some control entries have multiple entries per headstage/channel/etc.

briefdescription.para: Query a control value from the textual gui state wave.

detaileddescription.para: Convienience wrapper to make the call sites nicer.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, default to NaN] Some control entries have multiple entries per headstage/channel/etc.

briefdescription.para: Return a free wave of the status of the checkboxes specified by channelType, uses GetDA_EphysGuiStateNum() instead of GUI queries.

parameterdescription.para: one of the type constants from ChannelTypeAndControlConstants

briefdescription.para: Return a wave with NUM_HEADSTAGES rows with 1 where the given headstages is active and in the given clamp mode.
Return true/false if the given headstage is the highest active.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to all clamp modes] Restrict to the given clamp mode

briefdescription.para: Return a free wave of the popup menu strings specified by channelType, uses GetDA_EphysGuiStateTxT() instead of GUI queries.

parameterdescription.para: one of the channel type constants from ChannelTypeAndControlConstants
one of the control type constants from ChannelTypeAndControlConstants

simplesect.para: the mode of the headstage defined in the locked DA_ephys panel, can be V_CLAMP_MODE or I_CLAMP_MODE or NC

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, string controlName, variable val=defaultValue, string str=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: DAG_Update

briefdescription.para: Updates the state of a control in the GUIState numeric wave.

detaileddescription.para: One or both parameters have to be passed.

parameterdescription.para: [optional] numerical value, 0-based index for popup menues

briefdescription.para: Returns a list of unique and type specific controls.
Returns a list of unique and type specific controls with textual values.
Returns a free wave of the status of the checkboxes specified by channelType.

detaileddescription.para: The only caller should be DAG_RecordGuiStateNum().

parameterdescription.para: one of the type constants from ChannelTypeAndControlConstants

briefdescription.para: Return the mode of all DA_Ephys panel headstages.

detaileddescription.para: All callers, except the ones updating the GUIState wave, should prefer DAG_GetHeadstageMode() instead.

briefdescription.para: Parses a list of controls in the device and returns a list of unique controls.
Parses a list of controls and returns numeric checkBox, valDisplay, setVariable, popUpMenu, and slider controls.
Parses a list of controls and returns textual valDisplay, setVariable and popUpMenu controls.
DAG Routines dealing with the DA_Ephys GUI state waves
